## Sprint 4 Metrics

| Metric | Sprint 3 | Sprint 4 | Δ |
|---|---|---|---|
| Story points completed | 25 | 28 | +12% |
| PRs merged | 18 | 21 | +17% |
| Avg PR cycle time | 1.8 days | 1.4 days | -22% |
| Incidents (P1/P2) | 2 | 0 | ✅ |
| Test coverage | 74% | 79% | +5pp |
